summary: Joel Spolsky shares a brief New Year's Eve post showing off his DJ setup for a party he's hosting. The post is essentially a gear list describing his professional-grade audio equipment, turntables, and visual effects setup. It reveals Joel's interest in DJing as a hobby and his tendency toward high-end equipment choices. The post is a personal, lighthearted departure from his usual software commentary.
key_points: Joel DJs as a hobby with professional-grade equipment including Pioneer turntables and mixer
His setup blends analog DJ culture with digital tools, using CD turntables and laptops for MP3s and visual effects
Even in a personal post, Joel's instinct is to create a detailed, well-organized equipment list
money_quotes: I'll be DJing at the party tonight.
key_insight: A rare personal post revealing Joel's DJ hobby and love of high-end gear, offering a glimpse of the person behind the software blog.
